Item ID | Expected | Physical | Variance
EC-9921 | 1450 | 1442 | -8
EC-4402 | 800 | 799 | -1
EC-1109 | 3200 | 3195 | -5
EC-8832 | 560 | 558 | -2

The discrepancies are small but they keep happening every month.

pool.baseline:
hey i'm seeing a 500 error on our /api/v1/checkout/complete endpoint. it only happens intermittently during peak traffic. here's the snippet from the logs:

[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: Internal Server Error (500)
[2023-10-27 14:22:01] Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/app/services/checkout_service.py", line 142, in process_payment
    result = payment_gateway.authorize(amount, card_details)
  File "/app/integrations/stripe_client.py", line 88, in authorize
    response = self.session.post(self.url, json=payload, timeout=5)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/requests/api.py", line 73, in post
    return request('POST', url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 591, in request
    resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/requests/sessions.py", line 701, in send
    buff = adapter.send(request, **send_kwargs)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/requests/adapters.py", line 529, in send
    raise ConnectionError(e) from e
requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.payment-provider.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /v1/authorize (Caused by NewConnectionError('<stealth-service-prod-01>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused'))

what's the most likely architectural cause here?
